channel.title: SJL Insurance Agency Blog
channel.description: Insurance insights, tips, and advice from Seth Legatowicz of SJL Insurance Agency.

item.title: Why You Can't Afford NOT to Have Life Insurance
item.description: Think life insurance is only for wealthy people with big estates? Think again. Here's why it matters at every income level.
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)

item.title: 7 Reasons to Review Your Life Insurance Beneficiary Designations
item.description: You set your beneficiaries years ago and haven't thought about them since. That could be a costly mistake.
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)

item.title: 7 Reasons Why You Need Long Term Care Insurance
item.description: The U.S. Department of Health and Human Services estimates that 70% of people turning 65 will need long-term care at some point.
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)

item.title: Life Insurance by Age: What You Need in Your 20s, 30s, 40s, 50s, and Beyond
item.description: Your life insurance needs change as you move through different stages of life. Here's a practical guide to what makes sense at every age.
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)

item.title: 7 Reasons to Own Disability Income Insurance
item.description: Most people insure their cars, their homes, even their phones. But what about your most valuable asset — your ability to earn an income?
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)

item.title: Term Life vs. Whole Life: Which Is Right for You?
item.description: The most common question I get from clients. Here's a straightforward breakdown of the difference.
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)

item.title: How Much Life Insurance Do You Really Need?
item.description: A simple formula to figure out the right coverage amount for your family.
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)

item.title: Why an Independent Agent Beats Shopping Online Alone
item.description: Online quote sites look convenient. Here's why working with an independent agent saves you money and hassle.
item.author: seth@sjlagency.com (Seth Legatowicz)
